product_name: Bolz Playbox Music Spinning Top Toy for Children, The Funny Buzzing Hum Gets Louder As The Top Spins Faster, So Durable

bullets: IMPROVES FINE MOTOR SKILLS: this 'off-screen' toy helps hone your child’s fine motor skills through active, hands-on play. No batteries needed!
SILLY SOUNDS: the funny buzzing hum gets louder as the top spins faster.
SCALED FOR SMALL HANDS: perfectly sized so it's easy to grasp, grab, hold, and whirl.
OH-SO EASY-TO-USE: grip the tip and twist to spin; the soft plastic gripper base keeps the top secure so it won’t mark delicate surfaces.
HIGH-QUALITY: Made from high-quality tin and plastic, this classic spinning top is durable and built to last.
content.keywords: Classic train steam engine spinning metal tin top Maro bolz house of marbles vibe toy multicolored 70s toy game school eco-friendly imagination.Real Action and Sounds when the top spins.
content.description: BOLZ is continuing the great tradition of German toy production. The spinning tops, music boxes and drums in nostalgic tin are all crafted with attention to detail in a tradition going back to 1880.BOLZ products unite high demands in terms of tradition & quality with contemporary colors and attractive motives for children. The current, varied licensed articles also provide endless hours of fun. Suitable for children of18 months and older. BOLZ is one of the OLDEST toy brand in the world. The cute tin spinning tops open up fascinating worlds of color and sound for children of 18 months and older. When the top is spun, the child-friendly motives blur into a sea of colors and shapes. The polyphonic melodies quickly captivate children. BOLZ –a fascinating world of play without limits. High-quality tin toys from a brand with a long tradition Reeds create polyphonic spinning top sounds Stable thanks to suction attachment Spinning tops made of metal & wooden handle, base plastic suction cup

compliance.choking_hazard: WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD--Small parts. Not intended for children under 3 yrs
